results.title: ‎GyftPro: Gift Ideas & Wishlist App - App Store
results.content:
GyftPro is one of those apps you didn’t realize you needed until you try it. From the moment I downloaded it, the experience felt clean, intuitive, and genuinely stress-free. The app takes all the guesswork out of gifting — no more scrambling for last-minute ideas or worrying about whether a gift will land well.What really stands out is how simple everything is. The interface is easy to navigate, setup is quick, and the gifting process itself feels seamless from start to finish. It’s clear GyftPro was designed with real users in mind, not just features for the sake of features.For birthdays, holidays, thank-you gifts, or just thoughtful surprises, GyftPro makes it fast and convenient while still feeling personal. Impressive launch for a new app, and I can see this becoming my go-to for [...] Developer Response

  Thank you so much for the thoughtful review! 🎁 We’re thrilled GyftPro made gifting feel simple, personal, and stress-free—that’s exactly what we set out to build. It means a lot to hear this resonates with real moments like birthdays and surprises. We’re just getting started and can’t wait to make it even better!
 ### Game Changer!

  Happy Gyft Giver

  This app made my holiday shopping so easy. I was able to create events for everyone I was shopping for and add products directly to those events. They access to a bunch of different brands as well. 100% recommend, this will be my go to for gifting from now on.

  Developer Response [...] ## Ratings & Reviews

results.title: Wishes: Shareable wishlist for any occasion | Product Hunt
results.content:
Report

Chris Messina

Osaurus

Osaurus

Hunter

I'm a huge fan of Paste — and Wishes features the same attention to all the lovely details, but focused on the simple act of curating your wish lists. It's easy enough to find and add items to your lists, visually customize them, and then share them to others, regardless of the device they're on. I've used Reminders and Things 3.0 for this in the past, but this is so much more fun! ✨🎁✨

Report

Dmitry Mikhaylov

Hey all, Great app to plan your birthday. It's first user-friendly app where I store my wish list and share with friends. I love how easy it is to create and share my wishlist with Wishes! Such a game changer for gift-giving! Thanks! :)

Report

123 [...] Report

Mikhail Fabrikov

Tried a lot of wishlist apps, this one is the best, great work on design part! Just wondering, what are plans for monetization? Curated gift ideas is the way to go i guess? Anyway, congrats, would love to see Wishes thrive!

Report

Alexandra Protsenko

Paste

Paste

Maker

@mikhail\_fabrikov thank you so much for the kind words! As for monetization, at the moment, we offer handcrafted themes for purchase to add a festive touch to wishlists. Of course, we're always exploring other ways to enhance the app while keeping the core experience free for everyone. Thanks again for your support! 🙌

Report

Theodore Michalas [...] Hey everyone, We are so happy to introduce Wishes, the app we built to make gifting easier, more joyful, and to help people bring their dreams to life. Wishes allows you to collect all your dreams and desires in beautiful, customizable wishlists that you can share with anyone on any platform via a short URL—so you get exactly what you wished for, with no duplicates. Wishes was born from a personal need to share meaningful gift ideas with loved ones. We were driven to create a wishlist app that goes beyond mere functionality, making gift-giving enjoyable and memorable. With our small team, we’ve put countless hours into designing the user experience and making the app just perfect, though we still have a lot left on our roadmap. Today, we’re thrilled to finally let Wishes take flight—and

Review Throne 2.0?

Throne 2.0 is highly praised for its innovative approach to gifting for content creators, offering a privacy-first platform that enhances fan-to-creator connections. Users appreciate its ease of use, allowing creators to quickly set up wishlists and receive gifts from fans, fostering a deeper personal connection. The platform is commended for its focus on privacy and its potential impact on the creator economy. Many users highlight its convenience and effectiveness, making it a preferred choice for creators and their communities.
